summary:
PRESIDENTIAL PROTECTION AND INTERNATIONAL ALLIANCES: Brandon emphasizes the urgent need to pray for President Trump during his upcoming trip to Turkey, warning against making ungodly alliances and poor covenants. Brandon describes a vision where Turkey's leader is influenced by a vampiric, Antichrist spirit attempting to manipulate American decisions regarding Israel and a two-state solution. Furthermore, Brandon foresees complex geopolitical maneuvers involving Syria, Egypt, and Jordan, alongside manipulative advice from figures like JD Vance and Jared Kushner, urging that Trump's mind remains clear and unswayed by these deceptive international pressures.

DIVINE INTERVENTION DURING INDEPENDENCE DAY CELEBRATIONS: Brandon recounts how intense intercessory prayer led to divine protection across the United States during the Fourth of July weekend. Instead of facing planned mass casualties or shootings, Brandon notes that severe and sudden storms caused the cancellation or delay of 43 major fireworks shows and parades in cities like Washington D.C., Boston, Philadelphia, and throughout Oklahoma. Brandon interprets these disruptive weather events, which included 80 mph winds and extreme heat, as protective divine delays that dismantled nefarious plots against the nation.

GLOBAL CONFLICTS AND VISIONS OF WAR: Brandon shares severe warnings about an impending global escalation that could trigger World War III, specifically pointing to a future Russian attack on Warsaw, Poland, utilizing a new, unprecedented weapon. Brandon describes seeing demonic forces, including a spirit named Apollyon and an Hitler spirit, influencing global leaders like Putin to incite widespread warfare involving North Korea, Turkey, and a drafted American military. Additionally, Brandon highlights massive anti-American protests in Iran following the funeral of their Ayatollah, where crowds called for revenge and the assassination of the American president, further underscoring the volatile international climate.

SPIRITUAL DISCERNMENT AND THE REMNANT CHURCH: Brandon speaks extensively on the current spiritual state of the church, drawing a sharp contrast between believers who remain vitally connected to God and those who have become spiritually dead. Using a vision of a three-stranded umbilical cord, Brandon illustrates how true leaders receive fresh revelation and life, whereas compromised ministers carry the mark of Ichabod, their life sources withered and detached. Brandon asserts that God is actively making final selections for an end-time dream team, calling for a remnant that is fully dedicated and ablaze with a blue flame of the Holy Ghost to lead a massive global harvest before the imminent return of Jesus.

DOMESTIC UNREST AND NATURAL DISASTERS: Brandon issues prophetic warnings regarding severe natural and man-made disasters across the United States. Brandon envisions a massive, seemingly steered hurricane threatening Miami and the Florida coast, alongside warnings of arson-related fires in Colorado, Wyoming, and Montana, prompting calls for miraculous rain. In the political and social sphere, Brandon describes a demonic attempt to raise up a new radical political figure akin to Obama, warning that this could spark violent riots, the burning of Trump Tower, and widespread pillaging in New York if not mitigated by continued prayer and spiritual vigilance.

JUDICIAL SHIFTS AND INTERNATIONAL LIBERATION: Brandon details specific visions regarding the United States Supreme Court and geopolitical shifts in the Caribbean. Brandon describes Supreme Court Justice Amy Coney Barrett through the metaphor of a fading olive leaf, indicating a troubling ideological shift toward the left driven by a double-minded spirit. On the international front, Brandon prophesies the imminent liberation of Cuba following island-wide blackouts, predicting the removal of its dictators and a transition to freedom before November, paralleling this with continued intercessory focus on ongoing legislative battles like the Save America Act.
rawData: [July 6, 2026]-[Come pray with me]-[https://youtu.be/V3w8-580i2s]-[All right. Good morning, almost afternoon, family. Thank you for joining us again today. We're going to go over some of the things we see in the news real quick and then we'll jump in the river. We're going to pray for President Trump because he's headed to Turkey, and we're going to pray for him for this meeting, whatever he's doing. We're going to cover him, his plane, and everything he eats; we have to cover him in prayer. He'll be there for, I think, three days, so we're going to cover him the whole time he's there. We have assignments, you know, and so we're going to pray over our nation. But isn't Jesus wonderful? There were no major shootings or anything for the Fourth of July. I don't think we had much; I think we only had one little bit of a little something, but it was nothing at all. The hand of the Lord protected our nation, and you could sense it as we were praying. There was a disturbance—I could feel it very strong all afternoon on the 4th, interceding for the firework shows. But what I think is amazing is what happened regarding the firework shows. I believe there was divine intervention for the fireworks shows concerning the mass casualties, shootings, and things like that. As we see, go ahead and show all that happened. This is not normal. 43 major firework shows were cancelled across America, and they had to reschedule or delay. 43 major cities. That's not normal. Philadelphia, Chicago—go ahead and show them the list. Oh, okay, you didn't get a list? That's what I asked you before we started. I said, 'Don't start until you have that list of all the cities.' All right, it's fine. For one, Washington D.C. was a major one. There were over 300,000 people that had gathered to watch the fireworks shows and the massive celebration. Then a storm came out of nowhere with lightning and everything. Everybody, they were telling, 'Get out of here.' They were flipping the tables over and making all the people leave. So they went on and had the fireworks show, I think at midnight or 1:00 AM, and only 100,000 people out of the 300,000 showed up to come watch it again. This is the District; this is where they cancelled the District. I know, but I was looking for... do you have any little videos of the people saying they cancelled it? There was one in Chicago that was delayed. Philadelphia... I thought the big ones, because the Lord specifically told us to pray over Philadelphia. Boston, Massachusetts. Praying over Boston. The Lord said, 'Pray over Boston.' And I kept interceding. I prayed for Boston a lot and for the Red Sox, and there was stuff that got cancelled. What is this right here? This is a Boston concert and fireworks. Show them that. So all the Boston fireworks got cancelled or delayed. I don't know if it was completely cancelled or if they went ahead and did it, but even all over the state of Oklahoma, a massive storm came in at 8:00 with 80 mph winds—90—blew trees over. It was bad. It came out of nowhere. People say, 'Well, that's destructive.' Well, it's divine delays. Regardless, people are going to do what they want to do; they're thick-headed. But the Lord's trying to show you there's something to this. The storms came in with 80 mile per hour winds over Oklahoma, blew all through Tulsa, Oklahoma City, Edmond, and they cancelled a lot of firework shows. I don't know if they went ahead and redid them, but the terror in the heartland... praying over the heartland. So they didn't have anything, and it was all done away with. Then we have Washington D.C. It was major, and so it's very interesting to me. Even New York City had stuff going on. Go ahead. Can you show some of it? This is what the whole focus was today: to give God glory. This is what I was trying to show them. Giving God glory for why I believe this was prayer. 'Welcome back to America 250. Events are being delayed in D.C. because of that bad weather.' A spokesperson just moments ago from Freedom 250 putting out a statement saying, 'The safety of our guests, performers, and staff is our top priority due to approaching severe storms. Freedom 250, the U.S. Secret Service, the Park Service, and National Park Service are asking guests to evacuate event grounds and seek temporary shelter in a nearby area.' We will continue to follow this as you look live over the Mall. It doesn't look like everyone's leaving, but apparently, there are some approaching dangerous storms. So we'll keep you posted. Meanwhile, down in South Carolina in the Lowcountry, it is looking much better. Madison Scarpino is there; they cancelled the parade because of excessive heat. So the parade that we were praying over got cancelled because of the weather. They didn't even have the parade. More than 73 million Americans along the East Coast on this Fourth of July are under extreme heat alerts today, and that is causing delays or outright cancellations of several Fourth of July events. Independence Day parades in Philadelphia and Washington D.C. have actually been scrapped. Temperatures are just too dangerously high. The Great American State Fair will reopen today. No fireworks in some cities. Yes, I didn't know that. That's interesting. So on and on. But it's just interesting. I thought, 'How is this going as I was praying for the FBI, Homeland Security, and the CIA—all our law enforcement—to uncover and discover basically any plots, plans, or pursuits across this land?' Praying over these areas for no mass casualties. And I thought it was interesting because so many things were cancelled because of thunderstorms. I thought that's wild. Do you have more to show them? Well, show me Philadelphia. What about the one in Chicago? You talked about Chicago. If you don't, that's fine. I'm going to move on. Was there anything else you wanted to show today? We see the Islamic... they had the big funeral and throughout the 4th of July, they kept having huge massive gatherings in Iran for Death to America, chanting 'Death to America,' mad at America—all the things that are going on for our 250th anniversary for our country. They were saying all these major things for the funeral for Ayatollah Khamenei. Do you have some of that? Yes. See that? Go ahead. I wonder if these people are really grieving or if they're like the people of North Korea, where they're forced to, and if you don't act out, you're tortured or hurt really bad. I wonder sometimes if they really knew him and if they were really grieving about this guy. Some of them are in little boxes. I wonder who's in the box. I think it's cremated or something. But Muslims don't get cremated, right? Is that just his pieces? That's weird. So these are all the massive gatherings of the people just upset at America, saying 'Death to America.' And then they had the leader vow for revenge, calling for Trump's assassination. They want him gone and they want somebody to take out our President. So their leader was saying that they wanted revenge about that. This man right here now. I don't know who this idiot is, but go ahead and play him. Can you hear him? Yes. Could you ever have imagined that one day we'd be praying over the body of our martyred Mr. Aname? I was just on my way here; I kept imagining that this wouldn't be the case. We've always come here for Eid prayers like this, and the way this happened is unbearable for anyone. He was one of a kind; there was no one like him. He touched all our hearts with his own heart. Now our hearts have stopped. Reflect upon the tragic fate of Imam Hussein, the grandson of the prophet, peace be upon him, whose sacrifice remains a powerful symbol of justice and courage for all people. It's been 37 years; my whole life has been with him. In this way, God willing, God will help. The killers of our martyred Imam will not die a natural death, and the people will take this revenge. The system will take this revenge, and it's unimaginable that the killers of our leader would walk the earth alive. Revenge will be taken. That's all. So, we hear what they're saying, right? He said he wants revenge; they want revenge. And so, they're all calling out for revenge. That's why I think it's even more of a miracle that on the 250th anniversary, we had nothing as far as a covering and all the storms. And I thought, isn't this interesting? But as they're protesting, they're in the streets. They're upset about it, and because of our anniversary, they have the bodies in glass. There's a lot of people; it says about 12 million. Twelve million people, wow. Twelve million people as they were grieving their president and their Ayatollah. So, they have things and they're throwing things at Trump. Do you understand why we're here today? He's going to be in Turkey on their turf, so we must pray a hedge of protection on this. I told you I saw the leader of Turkey as a vampire in the days ahead. He puts on a cloak and he will take over the Black Sea and the strait coming out of the Black Sea. I saw them beating their war drums in the days ahead against Israel and for a strike coming against Damascus. I saw them beating their war drums and I saw them going to a wounded brother in the days ahead with Syria. They were going alongside Russia because of an escalation of war. Now, when I'm seeing the news now of what we saw back—was it this time last year—even some of the things the Lord has showed us over a year ago to pray about Turkey joining the war, Putin using unconventional weapons of war concerning Poland in the days ahead. I said I saw him shooting a new kind of missile. And the Lord I said, 'Is this nuclear?' And the Lord said, 'This is not nuclear, but it is a weapon that has never been used before.' This is a new type of weapon that's never been used before. And the Lord said, 'Watch Poland. Watch Warsaw. Watch this area, for there will be an escalation when Putin strikes Warsaw, Poland.' This will be the beginning of World War III of a major World War III. And I saw America join in with this and I saw an escalation of things. The Lord said, 'Pray for this.' Remember, does anybody remember? And I said, 'Watch Poland.' Do you see the headlines in the news? Yeah. So, Russia planning attack on Poland. And I said, when they strike Warsaw with a weapon that we've never seen before—and that's why I saw there would be a draft—I saw a draft for the United States of America because behind the scenes I saw North Korea being involved, Turkey being involved, and other allies concerning Russia to escalate using weapons that are bigger than the little rockets they're using right now. I saw major stuff and so here we see this: 'Polish PM warns critical months ahead and faces a Russia threat,' and this is what the Lord showed us over a year ago. I believe that's what it is. It's interesting because it's the same place. So we see in part; a lot of times I don't have a clue. That's why prophetic is hard to me and I always say I'm not prophetic. I see these things but I don't know the timing of it. He just gives me what I'm supposed to have to pray and I'm like, 'Wow.' And so, has it happened yet? No, it hasn't happened yet, but they're talking about it and there's rumblings of it and it's in the news. And I'm like, if what I saw comes to pass, it's bad. I saw the Tasmanian devil coming up out of the ground and I said, 'Who is this?' And he said, 'That's Apollyon.' And Apollyon came up out of the pit and started spinning around Putin. And I saw him over his thinking, oppress him with 'war, war, war.' And I saw Apollyon come up. And I saw an angel release the chains off of Apollyon. And Apollyon had a Viking outfit on. And he shot up out of the ground. He was being held captive in a chamber and they had massive chains on him. And I saw an angel release this demonic-looking thing with horns come up out of the ground and start spinning around. And he went right to Russia. And I heard 'war, war.' And I saw as I saw this, a darkness came upon his face—not on the angel, but on the demonic thing, on Putin. And then I saw them taking a bat signal with Hitler, trying to do satanic things to bring forth a Hitler spirit over Europe for a new World War III to turn into World War III. And I saw the old tanks and the old things all throughout England and all these areas because of finances and things. I saw major bankers that were behind this. They said, 'We want to bring forth the Mahdi. We want to bring forth the Antichrist, and it will come through war,' is what their plan was. And a plague—new plagues and famine and viruses and war go hand in hand. All of it go together: wars, plagues, famine, all this. And you saw it in writing. So, interesting, huh? So, we're seeing Poland now. And this is concerning Poland. The Lord said, 'Watch Warsaw.' And so, are we afraid of this? I'm not. I know Jesus is coming. I have an expectation for what's about to happen in my spirit. Jesus Christ is coming. And he is bringing forth right now his key faces. As I saw this in the spirit, I saw—and you know when I told you I saw—the Lord said, 'Don't hang around dead people. Don't hang around dead stuff and try to let them influence you. You influence them to come out of it.' Right? But I saw Ichabod on certain ministers' doorsteps. Ichabod because they have detached themselves from the life source. And as I was talking to one general yesterday, I saw blue coming off of the life source that looked like a sapphire that was attached to the umbilical cord of the navel of the belly of an individual. And the life source had a three-stranded cord in this that was coming out of the Father. As you were attached to the vine and you're the branch, you're attached to the vine. It was going down and it went into the individual. But as it was there, it was feeding life. Fresh Rhema, fresh revelation from him was coming as you are attached to him. But it was three: it was two on top—two of the cords were on top—and one was on the bottom. It went like this. And it was on a cord; a three-stranded cord is not easily broken. But as I saw a cord that was attached to you as a believer, if you're attached to the life source of Jesus, you are flourishing. But as I saw certain key figures of leaders who once were—I'll call it like that—have cut themselves off of the life source of him. They had that umbilical cord wrapped around their feet in this vision as I was praying this weekend. It was wrapped around the feet of the individuals that looked like something that was a yellow dried-up placenta cord, dead, lifeless, and it had an odor. And I saw flies by it. And the Lord said, "You can camp around what was dead or you can camp around what is alive. It's your choice. But if you keep camping around that which is dead, I have an Ichabod upon the doorstep." He said that will rub off on you. I saw certain things. The Lord warned me. I saw people who were alive, and that fire was a blue flame that was coming out of the Father. One individual said, "Is a blue flame hotter than any other flame?" I thought it would be red because things get red hot. I said that's what happens to metal after its acceleration of heat, but a torch flame is blue. The hotter the flame, the bluer it is. And I saw the blue coming out, looking like sapphires coming out of the Lord, feeding the individual with the Holy Ghost and fire. And the Lord said, "It's time for the Body of Christ to get hot. It's time for the remnant, for His eyes are running to and fro throughout the whole earth. And He's choosing right now. His gaze is upon His generals. His gaze is upon the remnant. And this is the final selection time, like it was with Gideon's army." Joshua's army? No. When they were drinking down the water, He said they lap it up; they're 300 strong. It doesn't take a lot to take a nation; it just needs obedience. It just needs somebody to say, "Hey, I'm yielded." So what I'm trying to tell you is right now God is making His final cuts. He's making His final selections. Will you make the cut? For many are called, but few are chosen. That's what He said. "Many are called, Brandon, but few are chosen. I have called a vast number of you, but will you make the final cut? Will you make the final cut for what God is going to do in being a leader for Him in this end-time move?" And He said that to me: "As many are called, but few have been chosen to lead this last push." I am selecting this new dream team, what I call the basketball like it was in the Olympics. He said, "I'm selecting my dream team. I'm bringing forth the end-time voices that are dead to self, that are alive unto me, and that are attached to me. For those that have been cut off, I saw an umbilical cord wrapped around their feet and they were dead." And there was an Ichabod upon them. I saw an Ichabod. And the Lord said, "Don't be one of these. Don't be like other men." When Oral Roberts went to school and he was up in Enid, Oklahoma, going to Bible school, he walked out and the Lord said, "Oral, don't be like these other men. Separate yourself unto me." He talks about it all the time: "Who are you attached to? Are you attached to me?" Don't worry about all these other people. You do what I tell you to do and you say what I tell you to say. So right now He's making His final selections of His remnant, His warriors. Right now the eyes of the Lord are running to and fro throughout the whole earth looking for a heart that is perfect toward Him. Who are the end-time generals? Who are the end-time faces? The new Davids, the new Hannahs, the new Esthers, whoever will be the ones that say, "Here am I, Lord. Use me." As the angel takes the coal out of the fire and places it upon the lips, will you be one of the ones that God can use because you have a clean heart? "Create in me a clean heart, Lord. I want to be the apple of your eye. Hide me under the shadow of thy wings." And that's what the Lord has been talking to me about for the last 24 hours. He said, "I'm making my selections. I'm looking upon my troops. I'm looking upon my bride right now." And He goes, "Many are called, but few are chosen." Many are called, Brandon, but few are chosen. I'm looking to see: do you make the cut? I'm never going to be arrogant enough to say, "Well, of course I qualify." He's examining the people right now. That's what He said to me. And you're about to see nobodies get a huge platform and become somebodies overnight. And the people who thought they were something, they're going to be humbled. There's a humbling coming to so much arrogance in the Body of Christ. You think you're greater than others and you don't deflect; you have a big head, but it's not about you. It's about Him. And the Lord said they've not deflected. They've not been obedient. They whine. They complain. It's not about having a cushion in the bank. It's about doing the Great Commission and bringing in the souls because Jesus Christ is coming. He said, "I'm leaving the ninety-nine and I'm going after the one." And there's so much lukewarm and there's so much stagnant in the Body of Christ, and it is a stench to our Father. It's time to arise and shine for the light has come and the glory of the Lord is risen on us to take this gospel into all the highways and the byways and telling people that Jesus Christ is coming and He's coming sooner than you think. Diana had a prophetic dream and the rain was coming. People weren't paying attention. As there was rain rising as in the days of Noah, so will it be. The rain was coming and people didn't see that the signs of the times were happening all around. The water level was rising, and she said, "It's time to get in the plane. Jesus is coming. We've got to get in the plane." And the dream was so detailed about where we are right now. She said there were so many people that were not prepared for what was happening on the earth. The rain came and they drowned. It was symbolic. Are you ready for the soon return of the Lord? Are you lukewarm? He'd rather you be hot or cold, but I'm telling you, He's looking for a people who are hot for Him. Do not be lukewarm and do not be cold. This is not a time to play church. This is a time to be all in. It's a time to be looking at Him and going vertical with Him on a day-to-day basis: "Jesus, I'm all in. I need you. I can't do this without you." So as we see these signs of war and rumors of war, and you see these articles and this stuff, it's time to be looking around. It's time to pray as we pray for our President today. We have him saying he sounds like Obama. Yeah, go ahead. Play these video clips real quick. Play that one about Obama and then speak. Do you have it? Yeah, about what he said about Obama. It was dark. There was no color. You had immigrants standing around him like this with a tiny little flag. It's like, oh my god, you could have been so much better because the guy's talented. He has a decent personality, but this thing did not deliver. I felt nothing. You know, at least when other politicians talk, I feel hate, I feel happiness; I felt empty inside. Maybe it's because he's so young and has literally done nothing before with his life that there didn't feel like there was anything behind it. It kind of felt like he was the first Muslim mayor of New York reading a speech written for the first Black president. He was trying to be Barack Obama. But Barack Obama, you know, he'd say that stuff was wrong with the country, but then he'd bring you up and then take you higher. This guy brought you here and then took you down. Aesthetically, you're looking at a guy with a beard sitting still like this surrounded by immigrants and he's saying, "You're racist and we're coming for you." That's how a lot of America saw that speech. So I've got to say something. My Mamdani, calm down, Mamdani. All right, relax. No one's afraid of you. We don't like communism and we're going to beat it. One of my favorite comments this morning was from Matt Whitlock, Joey, and he said that it was a 'dependence day' speech, not an Independence Day speech. You know what's so funny is he's using, I guess... Okay, so what did the Lord say? I saw a demonic empowerment coming from the devil to make him like Obama, a new Obama. But as we were praying this last time, I saw a new Charlie Kirk trying to come for the Democrats, the liberals. I saw it being funded by a certain billionaire and by a major politician that once was. They wanted to make this man a poster child for a new 'Charlie Kirk' concerning the Democrats. And I saw a planned thing to make it look like it was a radical right, but it was not. And I saw his life was in danger from his own party because he's too far this way, and they wanted to bring it and lasso it back in. And I saw Gavin Newsom as the poster boy of the speech. As Kamala Harris was breaking off to rebrand herself away from them, trying to connect herself with what she saw as the new and up-and-coming wisdom. But they wanted to use him as a new Charlie Kirk for the radicals, and as this happened, I saw them burning New York down because of his life being gone. I saw them burning buildings in New York. I saw the burning of Trump Towers. I saw people rioting and pillaging the Northeast, freaking out. Now, it didn't happen all over the nation; it was just up where his area is. And they were acting stupid and burning everything down—cars, planes, whatever they got a hold of. I'm just saying they were trying to riot. But I saw them trying to rally and ride a wave like Charlie Kirk's life. And I'm not saying Charlie Kirk's life was a wave; it was a tragic event, but it brought forth revival. His life brought so many people to Jesus after he passed. And what the devil meant for bad, God turned it around for good. His tragic loss brought a lot of people to Jesus, right? They were trying to copycat. I saw a copycat trying to be played out in the spirit when I was praying that day—a copycat for what they... well, if it worked for them, it'll work for us. It didn't work for us. This was a tragic event that God turned. What the devil meant for bad, God turned around for good. See, it's a warped thinking. It's carnal thinking. A lot of these people are full of the devil. They're demonically oppressed and possessed, and they yielded to the devil and sold their souls to him. And so, we know that God has the victory and we're going to keep praying, but I'm trying to warn you all of planned events in the days ahead that I saw in the spirit, which we don't want to happen. We pray for protection for everybody. I don't care if you're far-left, you're socialist, whatever. I pray for you to know Jesus. I pray for God to touch your life and that you would have a saving knowledge of the Lord Jesus Christ and repent before you go to hell forever. That's what my job is. We don't want any harm to happen to anybody. All we know is that Jesus died for every single one of us, from the worst of the worst. You know, Jesus died for Hitler. Jesus died for Stalin. Jesus died for Pharaoh... No, he didn't. Pharaoh happened first, I'm going to say. But he would have died for Pharaoh. Yes, Jesus dies for the worst of the worst. But Pharaoh happened before, right? Jesus died for so many. But you know what? It's us that rejects him. He didn't reject us. It's us that turned our back on him. Jesus is always there, an ever-present help in a time of need, with his arms wide open, saying, 'Come to me. Come to me. I love you. I have a plan for your life.' So, I pray for our nation. I pray for President Trump's covering today. For Cuba, I believe in the days ahead we'll be liberated. I believe we're going to see a lot more than what people realize. Ezekiel 38 and 39, the Lord said, is standing at the door. And so, as we continue to pray for these next six months going into the first of the year, now that we've passed the Fourth of July, we're praying for the World Cup. Mexico lost last night and they were rioting and acting stupid. This is what I saw: the green and white jerseys and people acting dumb. This is them in LA. They're upset. People lost their lives last night because of it. And this is what we were praying into. I said, 'Pray for the green and white jerseys.' So, right here. And this is in LA. Go ahead. Is there foul language? I don't think so. No, I think I watched this one. Shots fired. So they lost their life acting stupid in LA. Four people hurt, at least three. Okay, so nobody died. They're rocking this car back and forth. Well, people are just being dumb. Yeah, it could have turned out a lot worse, for sure. And then, interesting. Yeah. And then he was saying how he doesn't think he should have given 35 engines for fighter jets to Turkey. Very dumb. Do not trust Turkey. I'm telling you, he's going to turn into a vampire. Watch what happens. But we pray for President Trump to have more discernment. Turkey is bad. Hey, we put out a short yesterday, if you didn't see it, that went viral. In one day it got 1.3 million views, then 1.7 million views. It happened in less than 48 hours. We've had over 1.7 million views on it. Isn't that amazing? The Lord did that. I said, 'Look at you, Lord.' 1.7 million views. It's gone viral for us. That's huge. France's Macron to visit Syria, the first French president to visit in 17 years. And so the devil is going to meet the devil. I said the false antichrist, what I've told you that he'll be in the days ahead. He will try to be the Ishmael to the real Antichrist. And so he is going and making his rounds. He's visiting Syria. I said, 'Watch this man.' The man is bad. The Syria man is bad. And here he is. They're all buddies. They're all, 'Oh, look at us holding hands again, giving hugs.' Even he is, you know, because Muslims are really against homosexuality. He's like, 'Don't touch me.' He acts weird. Kind of weird in his face. You like that? It's kind of strange, isn't it? Like, 'Don't grab onto my arms like that, bro.' He acts awkward in his face. He's really happy about it because he's used to doing that in France. He's like, 'Let's be friends.' The other guy's like, 'No, don't grab a hold of me. It's awkward.' I don't know, it's kind of interesting. I wonder what kind of watch that is. That's nice. All right, let's go ahead and pray now. Ready? Oh, volcanoes. Braden... Huh? Yeah, that's Sicily, Italy. So, here's the volcano going off in Italy. That's a good find, son. I said we're going to see an active volcano start to erupt by Venice, and I saw a major eruption. And I saw a wizard, and I saw these things shaking, and a new lion come up out of there, and I saw the Vatican being shaken in the days ahead. I don't know how far that is from all that, but Rome's further down. But interesting, huh? Signs in the earth, signs in the heavens, signs all around us. Jesus is coming. I'm excited.
